Command: rm -f /tmp/jar && curl -s -i -c /tmp/jar http://localhost:80/list >/tmp/r1 && curl -s -i -b /tmp/jar -c /tmp/jar -X POST -d "name=test&url=http://example.com" http://localhost:80/add >/tmp/r2 && curl -s -i -b /tmp/jar http://localhost:80/list >/tmp/r3 && echo \'---cookies---\' && cat /tmp/jar && echo \'---list---\' && sed -n \'1,200p\' /tmp/r3 && echo \'---add response---\' && sed -n \'1,200p\' /tmp/r2
